verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are the Healer Healer of my heart The Maker and the God of all we are I was the broken vessel in Your hand But You looked beyond the hurt And made me whole again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Healer of the broken pieces You touched my heart and made it new Now my whole life I surrender Lay it down before the Mender Lord I give my heart to You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Love that sought before I knew You (You faithfully sought me) As brought me near to where You are Now I live to praise You Ever may I praise You The Healer of my heart

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh and nothing compares, Lord To knowing You Oh and seeing what the grace of God can do You faithfully sought me And called me Your own Then made the way to bring my wandering heart back home You are my Healer

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And now my heart is Yours forever I mean all of who You are And now I live to praise You Ever may I praise You The Healer of my heart
